checkpoint_metadata.commit_message: fix: Initialize DatabaseManager with db_url in MCP wrapper endpoints
checkpoint_metadata.purpose: Snapshot of working download token system before architectural refactoring

changes.description: Added cleanup_task field to APIState for download token cleanup background task reference
Implemented download token cleanup background task that runs every 15 minutes, removes expired tokens using TokenManager
Added graceful cancellation of cleanup_task background task on server shutdown

key_features: Background task for automatic token cleanup (15-minute interval)
Prevention of garbage collection via state reference

changes.description: Fixed DatabaseManager initialization with explicit database_url parameter, corrected set_current_tenant call, replaced current_user.api_key with jwt_authenticated placeholder
Fixed DatabaseManager initialization with explicit database_url parameter, corrected set_current_tenant call, replaced current_user.api_key with jwt_authenticated placeholder
Fixed DatabaseManager initialization with explicit database_url parameter, corrected set_current_tenant call, replaced current_user.api_key with jwt_authenticated placeholder

key_features: JWT authentication placeholder for MCP tool wrappers

changes.description: Added yaml import for config file parsing
Enhanced fallback URL generation to read external_host from config.yaml instead of hardcoding localhost
Enhanced fallback URL generation to read external_host from config.yaml for correct public IP resolution
Enhanced fallback URL generation to read external_host from config.yaml for correct public IP resolution

key_features: Dynamic server URL detection using external_host from config
Proper fallback behavior for remote access scenarios
Consistent URL generation across all three MCP tools
Support for network deployments (not just localhost)

changes.description: Enhanced get() method to support both attribute access and dictionary traversal for nested config lookups

key_features: Unified config access pattern (server.api_port via attributes, services.external_host via dict)
Backward compatibility with existing attribute access

required_tables: download_tokens (token, file_path, expires_at, created_at, metadata, tenant_key)

mcp_tool_wrappers.placeholder_api_key: jwt_authenticated (auth already verified at REST level)
mcp_tool_wrappers.server_url_detection: Dynamic via request headers with config.yaml fallback

background_task_lifecycle.startup: Created via asyncio.create_task() in lifespan context
background_task_lifecycle.storage: Referenced in APIState to prevent garbage collection

uncommitted_changes.note: This snapshot includes uncommitted changes that are part of the working state

method_1_git_checkout.description: Rollback to exact commit state (discards uncommitted changes)
method_1_git_checkout.warning: This will discard all uncommitted changes. Use method_2 to preserve uncommitted work.

method_2_preserve_uncommitted.note: May result in merge conflicts if changes overlap with rollback target

verification_after_rollback.description: Verify restored state matches this inventory

validated_features: Remote download from external network clients
JWT authentication at REST wrapper level
Dynamic server URL detection with config fallback

post_rollback_tests.expected: Server starts without errors, cleanup_task initializes
Returns download URL with valid token
Cleanup task logs expired token removal

success_criteria: All file checksums match inventory SHA256 hashes
File downloads work from remote clients
Background cleanup task runs without errors

handovers: handovers/0100_one_liner_installation.md - Upcoming installer using download tokens
technical_references: src/giljo_mcp/file_staging.py - File staging and ZIP creation

notes.snapshot_purpose: Capture working download token system before architectural refactoring for Handover 0100
notes.snapshot_importance: CRITICAL - This is the last known working state before major API surface changes
notes.restoration_urgency: HIGH - If 0100 refactoring breaks download functionality, restore immediately
notes.compatibility: This snapshot is compatible with v3.0+ unified architecture (single deployment mode)
notes.testing_status: PRODUCTION READY - All features tested and verified in network deployment
notes.maintenance_window: Keep this snapshot until 0100 is fully deployed and stable for 30 days
